videos.title: 23 CSS features you should know (and be using) by now
videos.description: Covers scroll-behavior, scroll-padding, scroll-margin, and overscroll-behavior with practical navigation examples.

videos.title: More CSS quick tips
videos.description: In-depth look at overscroll-behavior including contain values for modals, sidebars, and horizontal scrolling containers.

videos.title: Learn CSS Scroll Snap In 6 Minutes
videos.description: Covers scroll behavior concepts including how scroll-snap interacts with smooth scrolling for polished user experiences.

videos.title: True parallax with CSS-only is now possible
videos.description: Uses scroll-timeline and scroll-driven animations that depend on understanding scroll behavior in the browser.
